title: cyperus giolii var. nogalensis
intro: Cyperus giolii var. nogalensis, also known as the Nogales sedge or Nogales flatsedge, is a type of flowering plant in the sedge family (Cyperaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Cyperus giolii var. nogalensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction by boiling the roots or rhizomes in water, and can also be made into a tea or used in traditional herbal remedies.
